patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: EF Circular, IBM Plex Mono, Inter.
<AccordionItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, children, defaultOpen, style.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: intent, filled, title, dismissible, onDismiss, icon.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: src, alt, initials, size.
<Avatar> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: dot, intent.
<Badge> intent must be one of 'warning' | 'success' | 'info' | 'neutral'.
<Banner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: action, onAction, icon, dismissible, onDismiss.
<Blockquote> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: author, role.
<BreadcrumbItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, href.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, variant, size, shape, iconLeft, iconRight, iconWeight, fullWidth, disabled, href, type.
<Button> iconWeight must be one of 'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'.
<Button> type must be one of 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset'.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: image, imageAlt, orientation, eyebrow, title, footer, href, interactive.
<Card> orientation must be one of 'vertical' | 'horizontal'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, size, style.
<Checkbox> size must be one of 'small' | 'standard'.
<StatusIcon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, weight, color.
<StatusIcon> weight must be one of 'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'.
<Chip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: selected, onRemove, icon.
<Divider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: orientation, weight, label.
<Divider> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<Divider> weight must be one of 'weak' | 'default' | 'strong'.
<FormField> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, htmlFor, helper, error, required, hideLabel, children.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, weight, size, color.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, iconWeight, variant, size, shape, disabled.
<IconButton> iconWeight must be one of 'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'.
<IconButton> variant must be one of 'filled' | 'outlined' | 'ghost'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.
<IconButton> shape must be one of 'round' | 'square'.
<StatusIcon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, weight, color.
<StatusIcon> weight must be one of 'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'.
<Link> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, iconLeft.
<Link> variant must be one of 'in-text' | 'arrow'.
<Link> size must be one of 'small' | 'medium'.
<Logo> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: brand, src, height, mono, basePath.
<Logo> mono must be one of 'black' | 'white'.
<Modal> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, onClose, title, footer, width.
<Pagination> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: page, total, onChange.
<Popover> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: trigger, placement.
<Popover> placement must be one of 'bottom' | 'top' | 'bottom-end'.
<Progress> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, max, label, showValue, height.
<Radio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, size, style.
<Radio> size must be one of 'small' | 'standard'.
<SearchInput> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: onClear, size, style.
<SearchInput> size must be one of 'small' | 'medium'.
<SegmentItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label.
<Slider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, showValue, style.
<Spinner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, thickness, color, track.
<StatusIcon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, weight, color.
<StatusIcon> weight must be one of 'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, style.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon.
<Tag> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: intent, variant, size.
<Tag> variant must be one of 'filled' | 'solid' | 'outlined'.
<Tag> size must be one of 'small' | 'medium'.
<TextArea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, helper, error, required, style.
<TextInput> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, helper, error, required, iconLeft, iconRight, style.
<Toast> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: intent, title, dismissible, onDismiss.
<Toast> intent must be one of 'neutral' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning'.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, placement, children.
<Tooltip> placement must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'.
<StatusIcon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, weight, color.
<StatusIcon> weight must be one of 'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'.
<StatusIcon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, weight, color.
<StatusIcon> weight must be one of 'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'.
